scripts.build: node build-script.js && javascript-obfuscator build-pack/main.js build-pack/renderer.js build-pack/login.js build-pack/preload.js --output build-pack --rename-globals true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 && electron-builder build --project build-pack --publish never
scripts.release: node build-script.js && javascript-obfuscator build-pack/main.js build-pack/renderer.js build-pack/login.js build-pack/preload.js --output build-pack --rename-globals true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 && electron-builder build --project build-pack --publish always
